note: Stands in for the morning phase's gathered items feeding the day-checklist generator. Covers every tier in run-daily-workflow's ## Tier rules, plus both documented tiebreaks: amr-repair-t3l2-044 and amr-commission-t3l2-051 share Tier 2 and order by due date (the earlier-due item is the younger one, proving due date is checked before age); planner-nodate-7731 and planner-nodate-7844 share Tier 3 with null due dates and order by age (older item first). expectedChecklistOrder pins the one correct output ordering.
